mapper.select: SELECT U.UID AS "uid", U.NAME AS "name", U.PASSWORD AS "password", (SELECT STRING_AGG(roles, ',') FROM USER_ROLES UR WHERE UR.USER_UID = U.UID) AS "roles" FROM "USER" U WHERE U.UID = #{uid} LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
WITH UPSERT AS ( UPDATE "USER"
password = #{password},
name = #{name},
ip_address = #{ipAddress},
connect_time = #{connectTime}
WHERE uid = #{uid} RETURNING * ) INSERT INTO "USER" ( uid, password, name,
ip_address,
connect_time ) SELECT #{uid}, #{password}, #{name},
#{ipAddress},
now()::DATE WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM UPSERT)
mapper.select: SELECT U.UID AS "uid", U.NAME AS "name", R.AGG_ROLES AS "roles" FROM "USER" U LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT USER_UID AS USER_UID, ARRAY_AGG(roles) AS AGG_ROLES FROM USER_ROLES GROUP BY USER_UID) R ON (R.USER_UID = U.UID)
